flavor: "Let us find our gods together."
name: Ajak
text: Seeking Truth — Response: After Ajak is attacked and takes no damage, heal damage from a friendly character equal to Ajak's THW. (Limit once per round.)

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

name: Connection to the Uni-Mind
text: Permanent. Setup. This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, move all counters on your hero or cards attached to your hero to this card. Set your hero aside, out of play, and flip this card over.

name: Lives of Eons
text: Action: Choose one: • Search your deck and discard pile for an identity specific card and play it (paying all costs). (Shuffle.) • Shuffle up to 3 identity specific cards from your discard pile into your deck.

name: The Exclusion
text: Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After your turn begins, heal 1 damage from a defeated [[ETERNAL]] ally. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust The Exclusion → heal 1 damage from an [[ETERNAL]] ally (even if they are defeated).

name: Guard the Machine
text: Attach to a non-defeated [[ETERNAL]] ally you control. Attached ally loses the immortal keyword and gets +1 ATK, THW, and hit point. Response: After Guard the Machine enters play, heal all damage from attached ally. Forced Interrupt: When attached ally would be defeated, discard this card.

name: Skills of the Ancients
text: Each [[ETERNAL]] character you control gains the [[AERIAL]] and [[PSIONIC]] traits. Hero Action: Exhaust Skills of the Ancients → give an [[ETERNAL]] ally you control +1 ATK or +1 THW until the end of the round.

flavor: "I gave them everything." —Druig
name: Puppet Master
text: Hero Interrupt: When a player reveals a facedown encounter card, discard it → search the encounter discard pile for another card of the same type. Reveal that card instead.

name: Eternal Foresight
text: Hero Interrupt (attack/thwart): When an enemy would activate against you, discard Eternal Foresight → cancel that activation. Deal 4 damage to that enemy or remove 3 threat from a scheme.

name: Heed the Call
text: Hero Action: Ready your hero. Hero Action: Choose one of the following traits: [[ATTACK]], [[DEFENSE]], [[THWART]], or [[WEAPON]]. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a card with the chosen trait → add that card to your hand. Reduce the cost of the next card played with the chosen trait this turn by 1.

name: The Three Principles
text: Response: After your hero defends against an attack, defeats an enemy, or defeats a scheme, place 1 duty counter here (to a maximum of 3). Hero Resource: Exhaust The Three Principles and remove any number of duty counters here → generate that many [star] resources.

flavor: "Perhaps this too is a test." —Ajak
name: Path of the Priestess
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. If you paid for this card using a [wild] resource, heal 1 damage from a friendly character and give them a tough status card.

name: Deific Touch
text: Ajak gets +1 THW and +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you pay for a card using a [wild] resource, exhaust Deific Touch → give an immortal ally a tough status card. If you spent [wild] [wild] resources, you may give any friendly character a tough status card, instead.

name: Druig
text: Ulterior Motives — Response: When a side scheme is defeated, place 1 domination counter here (to a maximum of 3). Interrupt (defense): When a non-elite minion attacks, exhaust Druig, remove 1 domination counter from him, and choose another enemy → damage from that attack is dealt to the chosen enemy instead.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

flavor: "I ask for the approval of the Uni-Mind." —Druig
name: Fortify Power
text: Hero Action: Exhaust 2 Eternal characters you control → change to your alter-ego. Draw up to your maximum printed hand size. You get +2 REC until the end of the round.

flavor: "Do not play so lightly with your souls, friends." —Phastos
name: Ruthless Vision
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Ruthless Vision and deal 1 damage to an Eternal character you control → draw 1 card.

name: Payoff
text: Interrupt (attack): When the villain activates against you, cancel that activation and deal 1 damage to the villain for each player side scheme in the victory display. If a Druig player side scheme is in the victory display, this attack deals 3 additional damage.

name: Byzantine Machinations
text: Victory 0. While Byzantine Machinations is in the victory display, Druig gets +1 DEF. While Byzantine Machinations is in the victory display, Druig gains the text: "Action: Remove 1 domination counter from Druig → Choose a minion. That minion attacks an enemy of your choice. (Limit once per round.)"

flavor: "Sometimes a snake needs to let its venom out." —The Machine
name: Snakelike Cunning
text: Victory 0. While Snakelike Cunning is in the victory display, Druig gets +1 THW. When Defeated: Cancel the villain's next activation against each player.

flavor: "This world bleeds because of our arrogance."
name: Gilgamesh
text: Undaunted — Action: Take 2 damage → ready Gilgamesh. (Limit once per phase.)

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

flavor: "Thena's love is not soft. It has a sharp edge when it needs one. The love cuts until there is nothing else... Before the end, Tzaigo realizes what a fearful thing Thena's love is... but it is still love." —The Machine
name: Endless Warrior
text: Hero Action: Ready your hero and give them a tough status card.

name: Eternal Physiology
text: Your identity gains steady. Response: After Eternal Physiology enters play, choose a basic power. Your hero gets +1 to the chosen power (while Eternal Physiology is in your play area).

name: Gigaton Blow
text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Gilgamesh → deal 10 damage to an enemy. This attack gains overkill. This attack does 1 additional damage for each [physical] resource spent to pay for this card (to a maximum of 3).

name: The Forgotten One
text: Your alter-ego gets +3 REC. Hero Resource: Exhaust The Forgotten One and take up to 3 damage → generate that many [physical] resources.

name: Ikaris
text: The Arrow — Ikaris gets +1 ATK for each energy counter here (to a maximum of +3 ATK). Response: After an enemy attacks Ikaris, place 1 energy counter here. Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, remove all energy counters here.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

name: Biocosmic Blast
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. You may place 1 energy counter on your identity, if able. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme and confuse an enemy.

name: Eternal Ingenuity
text: Hero Response: After you place any amount of energy counters on your identity, place 1 ingenuity counter here. Hero Interrupt: When you attack an enemy, exhaust Eternal Ingenuity and remove 2 ingenuity counters here → stun or confuse that enemy.

name: Concentrated Beams
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal damage to an enemy equal to your ATK. This attack gains ranged and piercing. If this attack defeats an enemy, ready your hero and heal 1 damage from them.

name: Close to the Sun
text:
Ikaris gains retaliate 1. Your alter-ego gets +2 REC.
You take 1 less damage from undefended attacks (to a minimum of 1).

name: Makkari
text: Outrun and Outmaneuver — Action: Spend 2 resources of any type → ready Makkari and choose a basic power. Makkari gets +1 to that basic power until the end of the round. (Limit once per round.)

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

flavor: "We Eternals are not a team. We are a society." —Sersi
name: Warriors in Arms
text: Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 1 damage from an [[ETERNAL]] ally (even if they are defeated).

flavor: "A hero saves, and a hero sacrifices." —The Machine
name: Self-Sacrifice
text: Response: After an [[ETERNAL]] ally is defeated, discard Self-Sacrifice → search your deck or discard pile for an identity-specific card and add it to your hand.

flavor: "On this day I run, I race..." —Makkari
name: Thousand Strikes
text: Hero Action: Ready Makkari and make a basic attack or basic thwart with her. Ready Makkari and make a basic attack or basic thwart with her (exhausting her).

name: Protean Acceleration
text: Forced Interrupt: When the round begins, choose a basic power. Makkari gets +1 to the chosen power until the end of the round. Hero Action: Discard a tough status card from Makkari → ready her.

name: Phastos
text: Response: When your turn begins, place 1 energy counter here (to a maximum of 3). Forgemaster — Response: After you play an upgrade, remove 2 energy counters here → you may play another upgrade from your hand, reducing its cost by 2.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

flavor: "'Working too hard' is his power." —Thena
name: Technoforge
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Phastos and discard an upgrade you control → play an upgrade from your hand or discard pile, reducing its cost by the cost of the discarded upgrade.

flavor: "I am the Great Machine that is Earth. I am comprised of smaller machines." —The Machine
name: Reality Loom
text: Hero Response: After your turn begins, discard an upgrade you control → draw 2 cards.

flavor: "One way or another, I am always alone."
name: Sersi
text: Transformational — Resource: When you generate a [wild] resource, generate an additional [wild] resource. (Limit once per phase.)

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. name: Matter Manipulation
text: Interrupt: When you spend this card, exhaust Sersi or two other Eternal characters you control → this card generates an additional [wild] [wild].

flavor: "Start your scheming, Sersi." —Druig
name: Ever Adaptable
text: Requirement ([wild]). Hero Action: Exhaust Ever Adaptable and spend up to 3 [wild] resources → draw 1 card for each resource spent.

name: Sprite
text: Immaterial Illusions — Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, place 1 energy counter here (to a maximum of 3). Interrupt: When a boost card is turned faceup, remove 1 energy counter here → cancel all icons ([boost] and [star]) on that card, discard it, and draw a new boost card.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

name: Illusion Casting
text: Hero Interrupt (attack/thwart): When a boost card is turned faceup, discard Illusion Casting → cancel that card's "Boost" ability and all of its boost icons ([boost]), then discard it. Deal X damage to an enemy or remove X threat from a scheme, where X is equal to the amount of boost icons canceled.

name: Master Storyteller
text: Hero Response: After you cancel an activation, boost icons ([boost]), or a card effect or ability, place 1 energy counter on Sprite. Hero Action: Remove 3 energy counters from Sprite and exhaust Master Storyteller → shuffle 1 card from your discard pile into your deck.

name: Thena
text: Armory of Idea — Action: Discard a restricted upgrade you control → play another restricted upgrade from your discard pile, reducing its cost by the printed cost of the discarded card. (Limit once per round.)

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

name: Transformed Halberd
text: Restricted. Hero Response (thwart): After your hero attacks and defeats an enemy, exhaust Transformed Halberd → remove 2 threat from a scheme.

flavor: "This will save lives." —Thena
name: Transformed Spear
text: Restricted. Hero Response (attack): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, exhaust Transformed Spear → deal 3 damage to an enemy.

flavor: "She is the book and the blade." —The Machine
name: Transformed Sword
text: Restricted. Hero Response: After your hero attacks and defeats an enemy, exhaust Transformed Sword → ready your hero or draw 1 card.

name: Eros
text: Basic Instincts — Action: Spend [mental][mental] resources → place 1 energy counter here. (Limit once per round.) Interrupt: When Eros thwarts, remove 1 energy counter here → confuse a minion. You may remove 1 additional energy counter to confuse the villain, instead.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

flavor: "Is it a relaxing drink or saving the world first?" —Eros
name: Stellar Shot
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy and confuse it. If that enemy was already confused, this attack deals 6 damage and gains overkill instead.

name: The Starfox
text: Eros gains the [[AVENGER]] trait. Hero Response: When you deal damage to a confused enemy, that attack deals +1 damage. Hero Action: Discard a confused status card from an enemy and exhaust The Starfox → ready Eros and draw 1 card.

flavor: "I'm not joining you. This is a job."
name: Jack of Knives
text: [star] Subtle Blades — Jack of Knives' THW and ATK are equal to the highest number of boost icons ([boost]) on an encounter card in play, to a minimum of 1.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

name: The Hall of Blades
text: Cards attached here count for Jack of Knives' "Subtle Blades" ability, but are not in play. Forced Interrupt: When you would discard a treachery after resolving it, discard 1 random card attached here, if able. Then, attach the resolved treachery here instead of discarding it.

name: Assassin's Quarry
text: Hero Interrupt: When you defeat an enemy or a side scheme, discard Assassin's Quarry → remove threat from a scheme equal to the number of boost icons ([boost]) on the defeated card, or attach it to Hall of Blades instead of discarding it. Ready Jack of Blades.

name: Kingo
text: Response: When your turn begins, place 1 energy counter here (to a maximum of 6). Interrupt: When you attack an enemy, remove any number of energy counters here → that attack deals +1 damage to that enemy for each energy counter removed this way.

name: The Uni-Mind
text: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

flavor: "Death to he whom death loathes!" —Kingo
name: Fatal Slice
text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Kingo → deal 9 damage to an enemy. This attack gains overkill. Place 1 energy counter on Kingo (to a maximum of 6) for each [physical] resource spent to play this card.

flavor: "Kingo! He is a smiling mask. Amusing, but who truly knows what—if anything—lies beneath?" —The Machine
name: Riposte
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing. Draw 1 card or place 2 energy counters on Kingo (to a maximum of 6).

name: Ajak
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Path of the Priestess). [star] Interrupt: When Ajak thwarts, heal 1 damage from another friendly [[ETERNAL]] character.

name: Druig
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Snakelike Cunning). Response: After a player side scheme is defeated, exhaust Druig and deal him 1 damage → draw 1 card. Draw 1 additional card if there are 3 or more player side schemes in the victory display.

name: Eros
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Stellar Shot). [star] Response: After Eros attacks and damages an enemy, spend [mental][mental][mental] or [wild][wild] resources → confuse that enemy. (Limit once per round.)

name: Gilgamesh
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Gigaton Blow). Hero Action: Exhaust Gilgamesh and spend [physical][physical] resources → ready an [[ETERNAL]] character.

flavor: "Call me when I am required."
name: Ikaris
text:
Immortal. Setup. Signature (Concentrated Beams).
[star] Ikaris' basic attacks gain ranged.

name: Jack of Knives
text:
Immortal. Setup. Signature (Assassin's Quarry).
[star] Jack of Knives' THW and ATK are equal to the highest number of boost icons ([boost]) on an encounter card in play, to a minimum of 1.

name: Kingo
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Riposte). Response: When your turn begins, place 1 energy counter here (to a maximum of 6). Interrupt: When Kingo attacks, remove 3 charge counters from Kingo → he gets +1 ATK for this attack.

name: Makkari
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Thousand Strikes). Response: After Makkari readies during your turn → heal 1 damage from her. (Limit thrice per round.)

name: Phastos
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Technoforge). [star] Response: After Phastos attacks, play an upgrade from your hand, reducing its cost by 1.

name: Sersi
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Matter Manipulation). Resource: When you generate a [star] resource, exhaust Sersi and deal 1 damage to her → generate an additional [star] resource.

name: Sprite
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Illusion Casting). Interrupt: When Sprite thwarts, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card has a star icon ([star]) in its boost area, Sprite takes no consequential damage for this thwart.

name: Thena
text: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Transformed Halberd, Transformed Spear, or Tranformed Sword). Action: Exhaust Thena → ready a restricted upgrade.

name: The Prime Eternal
text: Each [[Eternal]] character you control gets +1 hit point. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust an [[Eternal]] character → draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.) Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust 3 [[Eternal]] characters → take control of The Prime Eternal. Any player may activate this ability.

name: Never Die, Never Win
text:
Give to a Uni-Mind player. Defeat an [[Eternal]] ally you control and take 3 indirect damage. Discard this card.
[star] Boost: Deal 2 damage to a friendly [[Eternal]] character.

name: Family Feud
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When an ally suffers consequential damage, they take 1 additional consequential damage.

name: Heel Turn
text: Treat attached ally as a minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW, it gains the villainous keyword, and does not take consequential damage. When Revealed: Attach to an undefeated immortal ally without Heel Turn attached and heal all damage from it. Attached ally engages its controller. (The Uni-Mind's nemesis minion.)

name: Savage Immortals
text:
Forced Interrupt: Savage Immortals' attacks deal indirect damage. This damage must be assigned first to allies you control, if able.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "A monster stalks my veins." —The Machine
name: Wolf Amongst the Flock
text: When Revealed: A minion with Heel Turn attached activates against you, if able. Otherwise, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Heel Turn and reveal it. Give a minion with Heel Turn attached a tough status card.
